# Premium Construction UK
> Full-service construction and home improvement company in the UK. Extensions, whole-house renovations, kitchens, bathrooms, electrical, gas, and solar installations.

Premium Construction UK is a professional construction and home improvement company serving residential and commercial clients across the United Kingdom. We handle everything from whole-house renovations and home extensions to kitchen and bathroom remodels, electrical work, gas installations, and solar panel systems. Quality craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results.

## Services

- [Whole House Renovation](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/whole-house): Full property refurbishments — structural, cosmetic, and systems-level renovation
- [Extensions](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/extensions): Single-storey and double-storey home extensions — planning, build, and finish
- [Kitchen & Bathroom](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/kitchen-bathroom): Full kitchen and bathroom design and installation
- [Electrical](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/electrical): Rewiring, consumer unit upgrades, EV charger installation, and general electrical work
- [Gas](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/gas): Boiler installation and servicing, gas line work, and central heating systems
- [Solar](https://premiumconstruction.uk/services/solar): Solar panel installation, battery storage, and energy efficiency assessments

## PrimeStone

- [PrimeStone](https://premiumconstruction.uk/primestone): Our premium stone and masonry product line for driveways, patios, and exterior finishes

## Key Facts

- Fully insured and certified tradespeople
- Serving residential and commercial clients across the UK
- End-to-end project management — design through completion
- Transparent fixed-price quotes
- Specialists in extensions, renovations, and green energy installations

- Website: https://premiumconstruction.uk
